description:
A screenshot of the CLC+ (Copernicus Land Cover / Land Use plus) Core web application interface, specifically the "Data Catalogue" view focused on "Ingestions". The top navigation bar includes tabs for "Data Catalogue", "EAGLE Ontology", "About EAGLE", "Organisations", and "Users". The current user is "User Admin/Support CLC+ Core", and a dropdown menu is open, showing "My Profile" and "Logout" options.

The main content area is titled "Data Catalogue" with two sub-tabs: "Ingestions" (selected) and "Extractions". A search bar is present with a "Search" placeholder, along with icons for a calendar filter and clearing the search. Action buttons include "ADD INGESTION" (green), a "send" icon (green), and an "Add Extraction" icon (partially visible, likely next to the send icon).

Below these controls, a table lists existing data ingestions with the following columns: "Name", "Type" (represented by a file icon), "Created At", "Created By", "Country", "Region", "Time Range", "Organisation/s", "Contact Person", and "Status" (with a sort arrow).

Visible table entries include:
*   **BBG 2015**: Created 13.03.2022 by User Admin/Support C..., for Netherlands, with a time range of 01.07.2015 - 31.07.2015, by European Environment Agency, contact infoservice@cbs.nl, Status PUBLISHED.
*   **BRP - Gewaspercelen**: Created 28.03.2022 by User Admin/Support C..., for Netherlands, with a time range of 15.05.2016 - 15.05.2017, by European Environment Agency, contact gegevensvragenA..., Status PUBLISHED.
*   **CLC+ Backbone Raster**: Created 28.12.2021 by User Admin/Support C..., for Hungary, with a time range of 01.07.2017 - 30.06.2019, by European Environment Agency, contact copernicus@eea.e..., Status PUBLISHED.
*   **CLC+ Backbone Raster ...**: Created 28.12.2021 by User Admin/Support C..., for Luxembourg, with a time range of 01.07.2017 - 30.06.2019, by European Environment Agency, contact copernicus@eea.e..., Status PUBLISHED.
